name: Sales & Policy Agent
description: Answers questions about sales data (TPC-H) and company policies using Cortex Analyst and Cortex Search.
routing_description: Use for questions about orders, customers, revenue, market segments, and company policies like refunds, shipping, and support.

name: Trace Analyst
description: Answers questions about agent telemetry, traces, spans, and performance metrics.
routing_description: Use for questions about agent performance, latency, errors, tool usage patterns, and observability data.

name: Knowledge RAG Agent
description: External Python agent that retrieves from knowledge docs and generates answers using Cortex COMPLETE. Instrumented with TruLens for full observability.
routing_description: Use for questions about company policies, FAQs, and knowledge base content.

name: Local Q&A Agent
description: Fully external agent powered by local Qwen 2.5 0.5B via llama-server. Uses LangGraph with think/draft/refine reasoning steps.
routing_description: Use for general knowledge questions answered by a local LLM with multi-step reasoning.
